data.acceptance:
1. `kno new --tag Journey-Github-Connect` stores and displays the exact tag spelling `Journey-Github-Connect`.
2. `kno update --add-tag MixedCase-Tag` stores and displays the exact tag spelling `MixedCase-Tag`.
3. `kno ls -g Journey-Github-Connect -a` returns knots tagged with that exact mixed-case tag.
4. Existing projects with already-lowercased tags remain queryable after the change.
5. Automated regression coverage exercises mixed-case tag creation, update, display, and list filtering.
